regions.comment: OSWORD &07 (SOUND) param block for sfx_fire: ch=&0013 amp=2 pitch=&4B dur=1
OSWORD &07 param block for sfx_hit_lo: ch=&0012 amp=2 pitch=&28 dur=1
OSWORD &07 param block for sfx_explode (sound A — noise on ch 0): ch=&0010 amp=&00F1 pitch=7 dur=&28
OSWORD &07 param block for sfx_explode (sound B — tone on ch 1): ch=&0011 amp=3 pitch=&FF dur=1
OSWORD &07 param block for sfx_score_tick: ch=&0012 amp=4 pitch=&64 dur=3
OSWORD &07 param block for sfx_level_start: ch=&0011 amp=4 pitch=&FF dur=&0F
Starfield engine state — three parallel 61-byte arrays. Loop bound is X<60 (60 active stars; the 61st slot in each array is unused). Mutated in place every frame by starfield_update in CODE.

comments.0x2800: Single-tone shot/fire sound effect — tail-call into OSWORD &07 with param block at sfx_fire_params.
comments.0x2811: Single-tone hit sound effect — tail-call into OSWORD &07 with param block at sfx_hit_lo_params.
comments.0x2822: Explosion sound effect — plays two queued OSWORD &07 SOUNDs back-to-back (noise on ch 0 then tone on ch 1).
comments.0x28D7: Per-frame: if &25A5 == 1, animate the force-pod (chomping ball at &2972/&2973). Steps a 6-frame cycle (&3860..&38D8) and watches for a key to dismiss.
comments.0x29E7: Draw 6-digit score at char-col 9 row &5F. Loops X=0..5 reading score_d* (&2A02..&2A07) and calls draw_score_digit per digit.
comments.0x2A08: Draw one score digit. A=digit value (0..9), X=column offset; selects gfx_digit_N (= &3A60 + 8*N) and plots a 4x8 sprite.
comments.0x2A20: Try to spawn a new enemy missile in one of the two slots (tbl_2B9A[0..1]). Validates enemy X position, copies enemy XY into the missile slot, sets direction (up if player_x >= enemy_x else down), and beeps via sfx_score_tick to mark launch.
comments.0x2AA2: Per-frame: step each of the two enemy missiles (at slots 0 and 1) then collision-check against the player. Slots with X=&FF are inactive.
comments.0x2AC4: Move one enemy missile by 2 px (up or down per tbl_2BA2[X]) and redraw. Erases old position with lev_erase_brush, plots gfx_icon_08 at new position. Deactivates the slot when the missile leaves the playfield.
comments.0x2B48: Box-collision check between missile X (slot scratch_28D3) and player_x/player_y (rough &83/&84 bounds). On hit, jumps to the player-death path.
comments.0x2BA4: Level-start GET READY!: draws the score, plots 7 icon_10 'lives' sprites at row &57 col 8..&F, shutter-fades to a black star field, plays sfx_explode for drama, then loops 75 frames updating starfield and blitting gfx_text_get_ready (split as two 8-col halves at cols 12 and 20) before erasing.
comments.0x2CCA: Title screen renderer: shutter_fade + 7 icon_10 row + icon_11 indicator(s) + the 4th Dimension logo (gfx_logo_4thdim, 56x32 at col 7 row &FD) + ampersand + 'GPR 90' + 'PRESS SPACE' (two 10-col halves, cols 10 and 20, row &82). Called by main_init.
comments.0x2E83: Beep that plays during the BONUS countdown roll-up (called from stage_clear_screen).
comments.0x2E94: Death/level-end transition: shutter_fade + explosion sound + state-clear loop. Called from CODE on death and from CODE3 game_over_or_continue.
comments.0x2EED: Level-start fanfare beep — long high-pitched tone. Tail-call into OSWORD &07.
comments.0x2EFF: Branch: if &2051==6 (fresh game, full lives) → ship_intro_anim; otherwise → draw_final_scoreboard.
comments.0x2F09: Plays the four-frame ship reveal animation (right-to-left): the player ship at lev_player_sprite (&4E80) is plotted progressively wider from col 5 → col 2 over four vsyncs.
comments.0x2F54: Setup helper for ship_intro_frame_*: wait a frame, then calc_screen_addr at (0, &C8), set sprite_src_hi=&4E (LEVD1), Y=&16 (22 lines).
comments.0x2F66: Run one frame: starfield_update + ~256*60 cycle delay + OSBYTE &13 (wait vsync).
comments.0x30F8: Save current score (score_d0..d3) and high score (&2E5A..) to the loader persistence area at page &0CF3+. Called when handing off to the BASIC loader.
comments.0x3115: Restore score / high-score from loader area &0CF3+ back into &2051 / &2A02..&2A07 / &2E5A..&2E5F. Called by main_init at game start.
comments.0x3170: PAUSE: plot gfx_text_pause (&4780) at col 16 row &D0, then loop waiting for SPACE (key code &C9). Erase the sprite using lev_erase_brush (&7D80).
comments.0x31B1: End-of-game / scoreboard display. Calls shutter_fade then a sequence of ship/text plot helpers; followed by a 6-iteration plot loop. Triggered when data_2051 != 6 in intro_or_scoreboard.
